title: Tick Tock Safe
poem_text:
Tick tock, tick tock steady,
Click clack, click clack ready.
Whoosh goes the wind so mild,
Hush now, my sleepy child.

Pitter pat, the rain so light,
Drip drop, soft through the night.
Creak says the floor below,
Step step, I’m here you know.

Breathe in, breathe out slow,
Shhh now, let the worries go.
cover_context: A cozy nightlight glows on a wooden bedside table, casting gentle shadows of a ticking clock and raindrops on the window.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, music box and light tambourine, 93 BPM, cozy and reassuring, steady predictable rhythm, safe and warm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
